scripts.prepackage: pnpm check && pnpm build:web && pnpm build:desktop && node scripts/package-preflight.mjs
scripts.test:tooling: node --test scripts/benchmark-omp-codex-transport.test.mjs scripts/check-release-consistency.test.mjs scripts/check-release-publication.test.mjs scripts/check-provenance.test.mjs scripts/deploy-demo.test.mjs scripts/deploy-site.test.mjs scripts/dispatch-site-deployment.test.mjs scripts/generate-release-manifest.test.mjs scripts/perf/perf.test.mjs scripts/reconcile-release-assets.test.mjs scripts/t4-maintainer-contract.test.mjs scripts/t4-maintainer-integration.test.mjs scripts/t4-maintainer-omp-publish.test.mjs scripts/test-temporary-directory.test.mjs scripts/tailnet-gateway.test.mjs scripts/tailnet-service.test.mjs scripts/wait-for-exact-ci.test.mjs scripts/wait-for-release-assets.test.mjs
scripts.check: pnpm check:release && pnpm check:provenance && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm build:web && pnpm build:site && playwright test
scripts.test:soak: pnpm --filter @t4-code/client exec vp test run test/projection.test.ts -t "retains a 10k snapshot" && pnpm build:web && playwright test e2e/remote-app.spec.ts --grep "@soak"
scripts.perf:electron: pnpm build:web && pnpm build:desktop && node scripts/perf/electron.mjs
